titleStmt.title: SII 10.502: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 502. (A.R. No. 233 of 1905.) ON THE EAST WALL OF THE DARK ROOM IN THE TEMPLE OF TRIPURĀNTAKĒŚVARA, TRIPURĀNTAKAM, MARKAPUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT. Ś. 1234. (Parīdhāvi)

summary.p: States that the worshippers and all other classes of servants attached to the temple of Tripurāntakadēva entered into a convention agreeing to abide by the orders of the temple Trustee (sthānapati). The king was Kākatīya Pratāpa-Rudradēva-Mahārāja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvarakākatiyyapratāparudradēvamahārājulu sukhasaṁkathāvinō daṁbunaṁ bridhi
virājyamu sēyucuṁḍaṁgānu parīdhāvisaṁvatsara bhādrapada ba 1 śu . śrītripurāṁtaka śrī manmahādē
vara saṁnidhini svasti śrītripurāṁtakadēvadivyaśrīpādapadmārādhaku laina tripurāṁtaka kṣētra vāsi Asaṁkhyātamahāmāhēśvarulakūnu svasti śrītripurāṁtakadēvadivya
śrīpādapadmārādhaku laina śrītripurāṁtakadēvara pūjārulu modalaina ḍebbhayireṁḍu niyōgālavārūnu tamalōna sa
mayamugā peṭṭina śāsanapaddhati veṭṭinanu śrītripurāṁtakadēvaranagarānaṁ mā kuṁ gala ṭhāvulu cetrālu tējyama Anubhaviṁci śrītripurāṁ
takadēvaranagarulō tamacēni paṭṭulapani sthānāpati paṁcina kramāna naḍaci nuṁḍaṁ galavāramu .
Digital edition of SII 10.502 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
